name: Palace French Film Festival
description: A curated selection of the best new French cinema, featuring dramas, comedies, and documentaries direct from Cannes and beyond.

name: Sydney Film Festival
description: Australia's premier film festival featuring world premieres, international competition films, retrospectives, and special events across Sydney.

name: Flickerfest International Short Film Festival
description: Australia's only Academy Award accredited short film festival, showcasing the best short films from around the world at Bondi Beach.

name: Japanese Film Festival
description: Celebrating the best of contemporary and classic Japanese cinema, from anime blockbusters to intimate dramas.
